mapper.select: SELECT terms_id, name, required, content, version, created_date, created_nm, modified_date, modified_nm, del_yn FROM terms WHERE del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY terms_id
SELECT terms_id FROM terms WHERE required = true AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO terms_agreement (user_id, terms_id, agreed, agreed_date, terms_version, created_date, created_nm, del_yn) VALUES (#{userId}, #{termsId}, #{agreed}, NOW(), #{termsVersion}, NOW(), #{createdNm}, 'N')
